revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:automatic wikipedia redirects]]" to "<nowiki>[[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]</nowiki>"

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Category_if_exists here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: <!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Category_if_exists for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] --> {{#ifexist:{{#ifeq:{{NAMESPACE:{{{1}}}}}|Category|{{{1}}}|Category:{{{1}}}}}|{{#invoke:If not given or empty|check_parameter|2|notgiven=|empty=|notempty=|}}|}}<noinclude>{{documentation}} [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:{{resolve category redirect|{{{1}}} }}]] [[Category:{{resolve category redirect|{{{1}}} }}| ]] [[Category:{{resolve category redirect|{{{1}}} }}|{{{2}}}]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>
